message:
feat(ext-fts5,e2e): add highlight() and snippet() scalar functions for FTS5

Expose highlight() and snippet() as SQL-callable scalar functions that
accept query text and markup parameters, making FTS5 result presentation
available without requiring the table-function calling convention.

The functions parse query text through the existing FTS5 query parser
with a fallback tokenizer for malformed queries, then delegate to the
existing highlight/snippet implementations. Both are registered in the
FunctionRegistry alongside fts5_source_id().

Add E2E parity test verifying highlight() and snippet() produce correct
marked-up output through the full FrankenSQLite stack.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
